sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114698" key="xrhsto/karpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστό-καρπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114698.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having, bearing good fruits,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
